MANCHESTER UNITED will announce the signing of Victor Lindelof from Benfica next week, it has been claimed.

Manchester United have reignited their interest in Lindelof after initially pursuing him in January.

United wanted to sign the Sweden international in the New Year but the form of Phil Jones and Marcos Rojo lessened their need for a defender and he choose to stay at Benfica and put pen to paper on a new deal.

But it appears Jose Mourinho will finally get his man later this month.

According to Portuguese outlet Correio de Manha, Lindelof's move to Old Trafford will be confirmed after Sweden's World Cup qualifier against France on Friday June 9.
